name: USA Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: USA Pawn & Jewelry in Phoenix offers pawn loans, gold/jewelry buying, and retail merchandise sales with flexible payment options including layaway and third-party financing.
description_long:
USA Pawn & Jewelry operates as a full-service pawn shop located at 3046 North 16th Street in Phoenix, Arizona. The store is part of the EZPAWN family of pawn operations and serves the Phoenix community as a collateral-based lending provider. The business model centers on providing quick cash loans secured by personal items in decent working condition.

The company offers a comprehensive range of services including pawn loans (short-term collateral-based loans), gold and diamond jewelry buying at stated fair market prices, retail sales of pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25-70% discounts, and specialized services like auto loans and firearms sales. They provide an online inventory browsing system, an "Instant Quote" tool for electronics valuation, and multiple payment flexibility options including layaway (10% down with monthly payments) and third-party "Take Today" financing (up to 12 months depending on credit eligibility). The company also operates an EZ+ Rewards Program that awards points on eligible transactions.

Distinguishing features include their stated commitment to testing all precious metals for fair pricing on gold/jewelry purchases, daily new merchandise arrivals, a dedicated online shop for remote shopping, and specialized protection plans (Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits, plus Product Protection Plans for electronics and other items). Store hours are Monday-Saturday 9am-7pm and Sunday 12pm-5pm, with phone availability at +1 602-813-3777.

A key caveat is that not all services are available in all areas—specifically noted, online payments are not offered in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania, which limits payment convenience for this Arizona location. The business model fundamentally depends on items retaining resale value, meaning borrowers risk losing collateral if loans aren't repaid. As with all pawn operations, the terms are governed by state lending regulations and individual store policies that require review with staff.
pros: Instant Quote tool provides fast, online electronics valuation without store visit
Gold/jewelry buying claims to test all precious metals to ensure fair pricing
Daily new merchandise arrivals and online inventory browsing system
Flexible payment options including layaway (10% down) and third-party financing up to 12 months
EZ+ Rewards Program awards points on pawn, redemption, sale, and purchase transactions
Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed loan amounts and 100% trade-up value on future purchases
Extensive product categories including electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming, firearms, and designer items
cons: Online payment option explicitly NOT available in Arizona despite being headquartered there, limiting convenience for this location
Pawn loans involve risk of losing collateral (personal items) if unable to repay within terms
Service availability varies by location and service type, requiring staff consultation for specific offerings
Protection Plans are additional one-time fees on top of purchase price, increasing total cost
Third-party financing (Take Today) depends on credit eligibility, excluding some borrowers
best_for: Individuals needing quick cash against personal items they're willing to temporarily forfeit
Gold/jewelry sellers seeking fair market value testing and immediate payment
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking 25-70% discounts on pre-owned brand electronics and merchandise
Buyers who need payment flexibility but lack traditional credit access or approval for bank loans
diagnosis: USA Pawn & Jewelry is best suited for Phoenix-area consumers needing immediate cash and willing to use personal collateral, or those seeking discounted pre-owned electronics and jewelry. The critical limitation is that online payment processing is unavailable in Arizona, eliminating a key convenience feature; borrowers should confirm all specific service availability by calling 602-813-3777 before visiting, as not all services are universally offered.
services: Gold and diamond jewelry buying and testing
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
Third-party financing (Take Today - up to 12 months payment plans)
EZ+ Rewards Program (points on eligible transactions)
Jewelry VIP Protection Plan (guaranteed loan amounts, trade-up benefits, free cleaning/repair)
Product Protection Plans (coverage for electronics and merchandise)
